author: missirol
body:
This PR is required by https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/50941, in order to address https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/issues/50636.

The new subpackage is assigned to @cms-sw/l1-l2 and @cms-sw/xpog-l2.
title: Assign new subpackage `L1TriggerScouting/NanoAOD` to L1T and XPOG
